rationale: Elec. Code §252.003 governs contents of campaign treasurer appointments for general-purpose committees. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 252.003. CONTENTS OF APPOINTMENT BY GENERAL-PURPOSE COMMITTEE.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns election code campaign finance disclosure, unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts.
